summary: Frontend-only e2e validation of ESIC Recruit360 prototype completed. Tested login flows (form + 3 quick-sign-in roles), role-based sidebar switching, all 14 admin routes, all 5 candidate portal subroutes, dashboard KPIs/charts, topbar language switcher (EN/TA/HI), notifications sheet with mark-all-read, user menu logout, vacancy detail drawer, candidate detail drawer (applications page), grievance lodging dialog, 404 fallback, and localStorage-backed session persistence after reload. Result: all critical flows pass. A few minor non-blocking warnings observed.

issues: Dashboard hero subtitle ('Today's activity', 'approvals pending', 'vs last week', '+24% YoY', 'Candidates progressing through stages', 'Reservation distribution') and the top breadcrumb 'Dashboard' remain in English even after switching to Tamil/Hindi. Sidebar + KPI titles do translate correctly, so the i18n wiring works — these strings just aren't routed through t().

Recharts emits repeated 'width(-1) and height(-1)' warnings on first render of the Dashboard / Reports charts (charts still draw correctly after the ResponsiveContainer settles). Consider setting an explicit minHeight on the chart wrapper to silence the noise.

Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby — accessibility warning in console: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}'. Add a <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby.

action_items: (Polish) Route the remaining hardcoded English strings on Dashboard.jsx (hero subtitle, chart subtitles, '+vs last week', 'YoY') through useLang().t() / translations.js so language switch fully reflects in main content.
(Polish) Add minHeight or aspect ratio to ResponsiveContainer wrappers on Dashboard.jsx to remove the recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warnings during initial mount.
(A11y) Add <DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby) to the Notifications Sheet, Lodge Grievance dialog, and any other DialogContent to clear Radix a11y warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: All routes render without crash and StoreProvider's localStorage hydration works as designed (user stays logged in across reloads).

Sidebar correctly switches groups based on URL prefix (/portal/* -> Candidate menu, /admin/* -> Super Admin menu, else -> Recruitment + Governance menu) regardless of the user's stored role — confirmed by inspection: visiting /portal while logged in as recruitment_admin shows the candidate sidebar. This is intentional per AppShell wiring but may be worth a security note if real auth is later added.
Login.jsx: Password input is uncontrolled-style but value is bound; submit() never validates fields (any blank username is accepted). Acceptable for mock prototype, document as known behavior.
Recharts ResponsiveContainer warnings suggest the chart card layout sometimes mounts at 0x0 — likely fine but should add explicit min height for SSR/initial paint safety.
test_credentials: Mock login: admin.user@esic.gov.in / demo1234 / Recruitment Administrator. Quick-sign-in buttons: 'Recruitment Admin', 'Candidate', 'Super Admin'. /app/memory/test_credentials.md does not exist — flagging here for future testing agents.
seed_data_creation: None — app uses buildMockDb() from /app/frontend/src/lib/mockData.js seeded into localStorage 'esic_db_v1' automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Build is solid for a high-fidelity mock prototype. Key selectors that worked: page.get_by_role('button', name='Recruitment Admin'|'Candidate'|'Super Admin') for quick login; header button:has-text('EN'|'TA'|'HI') for the topbar language menu (DropdownMenu, NOT a Select — items use native scripts: 'தமிழ்', 'हिन्दी'); 'table tbody tr' first row click opens both VacancyDetailDrawer (/vacancies) and CandidateDetailDrawer (/applications). 'Lodge Grievance' button on /portal opens a dialog with a single visible input (subject) + textarea (description); submit button text 'Submit'. /portal sidebar replaces the admin sidebar (confirmed). All admin and portal routes return OK without crashes. Recharts emits width(-1) warnings on first paint — ignore unless main agent fixes layout. KPI labels are uppercase via CSS ('ACTIVE VACANCIES'), so use case-insensitive matchers if asserting text.

verified_flows.dashboard_kpis_and_charts: PASS (6 KPI cards rendered: Active Vacancies 58, Total Applications 2000, Pending Approvals 36, Upcoming Interviews 7, Offers Issued 18, Blockchain Entries 120 — plus 3 charts visible)
verified_flows.language_switcher_en_ta_hi: PASS (sidebar + KPI labels translate; toast 'Language → தமிழ்' shown)
verified_flows.sidebar_role_based_switching: PASS (/portal -> Candidate Portal menu; /admin -> Super Admin menu; else -> Recruitment + Governance)
verified_flows.404_fallback_page: PASS (shows '404' + return home link with data-testid='404-home-link')
verified_flows.session_persistence_after_reload: PASS (Super Admin reloaded /admin and remained logged in)
